    How to Enable Employees to Punch In/Out Using the Mobile App

1. Click Timekeeping

2. Select Mobile Management

3. In Mobile Manage Setting, choose Employee Mobile Attendance

4. Use the filters (Company, Department, Section, Sub-section, Location, Classification)

5. Click Filter Employee

6. In the Action column, select Enable or Disable to update the employee’s current status.
• You may also use Enable All or Disable All to update all employees at once.

NOTE:
If the employee’s current status is Disable, it means they are not allowed to punch in/out using the mobile app.

    How to Enable Employees to Punch In/Out Using the Mobile App

1. Click Timekeeping

2. Select Mobile Management

3. In Mobile Manage Setting, choose Employee Mobile Attendance

4. Use the filters (Company, Department, Section, Sub-section, Location, Classification)

5. Click Filter Employee

6. In the Action column, select Enable or Disable to update the employee’s current status.
• You may also use Enable All or Disable All to update all employees at once.

NOTE:
If the employee’s current status is Disable, it means they are not allowed to punch in/out using the mobile app.
